faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about Smart Boost Labs.

whatIs.a: Smart Boost Labs is an AI-powered traffic exchange platform that helps you drive high-quality, targeted traffic to your websites. Unlike traditional traffic exchanges, we use intelligent routing algorithms to match your content with engaged audiences, resulting in higher engagement rates and better ROI.

howItWorks.q: How does the traffic exchange work?
howItWorks.a: Our platform works by connecting website owners who want traffic. When you run a campaign, your website is shown to other participants, and in return, their websites are shown to your target audience. Our AI routing engine optimizes this matching process in real-time.

gettingStarted.a: Simply sign up for a free account, create your first campaign by adding your website URL and configuring your target settings, and deploy the worker on your server. Once activated, you'll start receiving traffic immediately.

workerDeploy.q: How do I deploy a worker?
workerDeploy.a: Workers can be deployed on any server with Node.js. Download our worker package, configure it with your API key, and run it. Workers can be run as Docker containers, systemd services, or PM2 processes. Check our documentation for detailed deployment guides.

targeting.a: You can target traffic by country, device type (desktop/mobile/tablet), browser, and visit duration. Our AI also automatically optimizes targeting based on engagement metrics to maximize your campaign performance.

credits.a: Credits are the currency of Smart Boost Labs. One credit is consumed for each visit your website receives. You earn credits by having your workers serve visits to other participants. You can also purchase additional credits on our pricing page.

pricing.q: What happens when I run out of credits?
pricing.a: When your credits are depleted, your campaigns pause automatically. You can purchase additional credits at any time, or earn more by increasing your worker capacity. We'll send you notifications before you run out.

refund.a: Yes, we offer a 7-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans. If you're not satisfied with our service, contact our support team within 7 days of purchase for a full refund.

api.a: Yes! Professional and Enterprise plans include full API access. You can programmatically create campaigns, retrieve analytics data, manage workers, and integrate with your existing tools. Check our API documentation for details.

integrations.a: We support webhook integrations with any service that accepts HTTP requests. Pre-built integrations include Slack, Discord, webhooks for analytics platforms, and Zapier. Custom integrations can be configured via our webhook system.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Smart Boost Labs ("the Service"), you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by these terms, please do not use this Service.

service.title: 2. Description of Service
service.content: Smart Boost Labs provides an AI-powered traffic exchange platform that enables users to generate website visits and track analytics. The Service includes web-based campaign management, worker deployment tools, real-time analytics, and API access.

account.title: 3. Account Responsibilities
account.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account. You must be at least 18 years old to use the Service.

acceptableUse.title: 4. Acceptable Use Policy
acceptableUse.content:
You agree not to use the Service for any unlawful purposes or in violation of any applicable laws. The following are strictly prohibited:

• Spam, malware, or malicious content distribution
• Phishing or fraudulent activities
• Content that infringes on intellectual property rights
• Adult content, hate speech, or violent content
• Cryptocurrency mining or other resource abuse
• Any activity that may harm other users or the platform

credits.title: 5. Credits and Billing
credits.content: Credits purchased or earned on Smart Boost Labs have no cash value and are non-transferable. Credits expire 12 months after purchase. Refunds are available within 7 days of purchase for unused credits. We reserve the right to modify pricing at any time with 30 days notice.

workers.title: 6. Worker Deployment
workers.content: Users may deploy worker instances to participate in the traffic exchange. Workers must be configured according to our documentation. Abuse of the worker system, including but not limited to running unauthorized modifications, will result in immediate account termination.

data.title: 7. Data and Analytics
data.content: We collect data necessary for the operation of the Service, including visit logs, campaign analytics, and user behavior data. You retain ownership of your campaign data. We may use anonymized, aggregated data for platform improvement and analytics purposes.

intellectualProperty.title: 8. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: The Service and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by Smart Boost Labs and are protected by international copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, and other intellectual property laws.

termination.title: 9. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice, for any breach of these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will cease immediately. Provisions that by their nature should survive termination shall survive.

disclaimer.title: 10. Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.content: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. We do not guarantee that the Service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free.

limitation.title: 11. Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: In no event shall Smart Boost Labs be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use or inability to use the Service. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you in the 12 months preceding the claim.

changes.title: 12. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will provide notice of significant changes via email or through the Service. Continued use of the Service after modifications constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

governing.title: 13. Governing Law
governing.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which Smart Boost Labs operates, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

contact.title: 14. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at legal{'@'}smartboostlabs.com

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Smart Boost Labs ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our service.

personal.title: Personal Information
personal.description: When you register an account, we collect information such as your name, email address, and payment information. You may also choose to provide additional profile information.

usage.title: Usage Data
usage.description: We automatically collect information about how you interact with our Service, including your IP address, browser type, pages visited, time spent on pages, and other diagnostic data.

campaign.title: Campaign Data
campaign.description: Information about your campaigns, including website URLs, targeting settings, analytics data, and campaign performance metrics.

worker.title: Worker Data
worker.description: Technical data from your deployed workers, including server information, session data, and performance metrics.

useOfInformation.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
useOfInformation.content:
We use collected information to:

• Provide, maintain, and improve our Service
• Process transactions and manage your account
• Send you technical notices and support messages
• Analyze usage patterns to optimize the Service
• Detect, prevent, and address technical issues
• Provide customer support
• Communicate about products, services, and updates

dataSharing.title: 3. Data Sharing
dataSharing.content:
We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with:

• Service providers who assist in operating our platform
• Analytics partners to improve our Service
• Legal authorities when required by law
•Business partners with your consent for integrations

dataSecurity.title: 4. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit and at rest, access controls, regular security audits, and secure cloud infrastructure. While we strive to protect your data, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to operate our Service. Essential cookies are required for basic functionality. Analytics cookies help us understand how visitors use our site. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.

yourRights.title: 6. Your Rights
yourRights.content:
Depending on your location, you may have the right to:

• Access your personal information
• Correct inaccurate data
• Delete your data
• Object to processing
• Export your data
• Withdraw consent

To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy{'@'}smartboostlabs.com.

dataRetention.title: 7. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. Analytics data is retained for 24 months. You may request deletion of your data at any time.

international.title: 8. International Transfers
international.content: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your country of residence. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place for international data transfers.

children.title: 9. Children's Privacy
children.content: Our Service is not intended for users under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you become aware that a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.

changes.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through the Service. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: 11. Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights, contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy{'@'}smartboostlabs.com.

hero.title: Powering the Future of
hero.subtitle: Smart Boost Labs was built to solve the inefficiencies of traditional traffic exchanges. We leverage artificial intelligence to create a smarter, more efficient, and higher-quality traffic network for businesses worldwide.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Democratizing High-Quality Traffic
mission.description: We believe every business deserves access to quality traffic without the complexity and waste of traditional advertising. Our AI-driven platform automates the hard parts so you can focus on what matters — growing your business.
